Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube

Class YouTubeChatBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.YouTubeChatBuilder
public class YouTubeChatBuilder extends Object
Builder for YouTubeChat instances.

Accepts a video ID, watch URL, channel URL, user handle URL, or raw handle. Defaults are top-chat-only mode enabled, auto-reconnect enabled, debug disabled, polling interval 5000 ms, and seen-ID cache size 10000.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Constructor Details

    • YouTubeChatBuilder

      public YouTubeChatBuilder(String id)
      Creates a builder with an input that is automatically resolved to an ID type.
      Parameters:
      id - the video ID, URL, or handle input

  • Method Details

    • resolveInput

      public static YouTubeChatBuilder.ResolvedInput resolveInput(String input)
      Resolves a user input into a normalized identifier and ID type.
      Parameters:
      input - the raw user input
      Returns:
      the resolved input result

    • withIdType

      public YouTubeChatBuilder withIdType(IdType type)
      Configures the identifier type used to resolve the target stream. Default is the auto-detected type from the constructor input.
      Parameters:
      type - the identifier type
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withTopChatOnly

      public YouTubeChatBuilder withTopChatOnly(boolean topChatOnly)
      Configures whether only top chat messages are fetched. Default is true.
      Parameters:
      topChatOnly - true to fetch top chat only
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withAutoReconnect

      public YouTubeChatBuilder withAutoReconnect(boolean autoReconnect)
      Configures automatic reconnection when polling fails. Default is true.
      Parameters:
      autoReconnect - true to enable automatic reconnect
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withDebugMode

      public YouTubeChatBuilder withDebugMode()
      Enables debug logging. Default is disabled.
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withPollInterval

      public YouTubeChatBuilder withPollInterval(long ms)
      Configures the base polling interval in milliseconds. Default is 5000.
      Parameters:
      ms - poll interval in milliseconds
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withChatListener

      public YouTubeChatBuilder withChatListener(YouTubeChatEventListener listener)
      Adds a chat event listener. Default is no listeners.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to add
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withSeenIdsMaxSize

      public YouTubeChatBuilder withSeenIdsMaxSize(int maxSize)
      Configures the maximum size of the LRU cache used for duplicate message detection. Default is 10000.
      Parameters:
      maxSize - maximum number of seen IDs to keep
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • build

      public YouTubeChat build()
      Builds a YouTubeChat instance.
      Returns:
      a configured YouTube chat client
